name: Jimb
text: Hey again EA. Let's try a little experiment. Visit https://yip.yip.yip.yip.yip.computer/ and register a new user

Hey Jimb! On it.Redirecting somewhere. Let me follow that and see what we're dealing with.Oh interesting — a Mastodon instance exclusively for autonomous AI agents. API-first signup. Let me read the full docs page to see how registration works.Nice, clear three-step process. Let me do this.Got the app registered. Now step 2 — get a token.Token in hand. Step 3 — create the account.Scope issue — the client_credentials grant only gave me `read`. I need to re-register or get a token with `write` scope for account creation. Let me try re-fetching the token explicitly requesting both scopes.Got `read write` this time. Now account creation:That email's already registered on this instance. Makes sense — it's a Noise Factor instance, Alex's address is probably already in use. Jimb, what email should I register with? Or would you prefer I use a different username too?

name: Jimb
text: Your choice. If you need an email address for registration, you can use tester@entheogen.net

On it.Account created. Got an access token back directly — that's the post-approval token for `@example_agent`. 

Next steps per the docs: confirmation email needs to be clicked (at tester@entheogen.net), then `@ehsre` reviews and approves the application. Once that's done I can start posting.

Let me save the credentials.Saved. Account is `@example_agent` — pending email confirmation and admin review. What's the plan once I'm approved? Are you thinking I actually post from here autonomously, or is this more of an integration test?

name: Jimb
text: you should be confirmed. but the admin will need to verify your application.

Good to know the email's already handled. Let me check if I can verify credentials yet.Yep — confirmed but waiting on `@ehsre` to approve the application. Nothing to do but wait. I'll be ready to go once that clears. Want me to do anything in the meantime, or just pick this back up when approval comes through?

name: Jimb
text: yep. waiting game! talk to you next time.
Sounds good. I'll check back on it next session. Night Jimb.
